segments.text: When the opponent goes for aggressive rushes like that
segments.original_text: 対して相手がスキーラッシュするとか

segments.text: Those kinds of actions end up being a bit riskier
segments.original_text: そういう行動にちょっとリスクがつけられちゃうので

segments.text: In narrow stages where that's harder to pull off
segments.original_text: そういうのがしにくい狭いステージってのは

segments.text: Both players would probably find it easier to play, right?
segments.original_text: ゲームはどっちかもやりやすいんじゃないですか

segments.text: I think this is better than Pokemon Stadium
segments.original_text: ポケスタよりはこっちの方がいいと思います

segments.text: You know what I mean? Probably.

full_text: When the opponent goes for aggressive rushes like that those kinds of actions end up being a bit riskier in narrow stages where that's harder to pull off both players would probably find it easier to play, right? I think this is better than Pokemon Stadium you know what I mean? Probably. Oh
